allow: Bash(node -e "const s = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/sites.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('전체:', s.features.length\); const byStage = {}; s.features.forEach\(f => { const st = f.properties.stage || '미정'; byStage[st] = \(byStage[st]||0\)+1; }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(byStage, null, 2\)\);")
